title: J's ISLE OF BERK
description: Dangers of unknown, and dragons that soar threw the sky. Go and face every challenge bravely and with courage, tame the wild beasts and rescue the dragons from the evil dragon hunters!
body:
Dangers of unknown, and dragons that soar threw the sky. Go and face every challenge bravely and with courage, tame the wild beasts and rescue the dragons from the evil dragon hunters! find dragon eggs and hach them, and creat your own army of dragons, and defeat all your enamies that try to kill the dragons. Get out there and adventrue the wild skys of the Arkapelago! In this modpack, there are dragons from ISLE OF BERK, better cooking from FARMERS DELIGHT, and furniture from MACAWS FURNITURE!

This modpack provides a recreation vikking and dragon life, cook all kinds of delicios meals, tame dragons with all kinds of shapes, sizes, and colers, and bild a vikking village for you and your dragons! This modpack has Way Stones and Xaero's Minimap to help you travle long distences, and backpacks to help carry your tresure or junk, and better aninmals that make more sense! Also better trees that fall insted of just flout, and doggy talents so that you can train your dogs as well as dragons! Have you ever wanted to do a barrle roll with an eltra, now you can fly along with your dragons! I also added cool mobs to the modpack, like Critters and Companions! Did you ever want to display your weapons on you? well with YDM's Weapon Master you can! Do you think villagers deserve names, this modpack covers that as well!
